signup.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.

signup.passwordMax: Password must be at most 72 characters.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, payment method and invoices.
billing.loadFailed: Could not load your billing details.
billing.portalFailed: Could not open the billing portal.

noPlan.title: You're on the free plan
noPlan.description: Upgrade to Pro to unlock workspace-wide automations, custom statuses with WIP limits, and the full project archive export.

unconfigured.title: Billing is temporarily unavailable
unconfigured.description: We can't reach the billing provider with the current credentials. An admin needs to regenerate the Polar access token with the full scope set (customers, subscriptions, customer_sessions, checkouts). Your account and workspace data are unaffected.

dashboard.title: My Work
dashboard.subtitle: Tasks assigned to you across all projects.
dashboard.empty: No tasks assigned to you right now.

projects.subtitle: Plan, run, and track every initiative in your workspace.

projects.memberRestrictedHint: Only project members and org admins can see this project.

settingsForm.deleteWarning: Permanently delete this project, its tasks, dependencies, comments, and attachments. This cannot be undone.

onboardingChoice.joinBody: Join an existing workspace using your email invitation link.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

builtFor.heading: Built for any team, any workflow
builtFor.subhead: From engineering sprints to marketing campaigns — Tûm adapts to how your team works.
builtFor.footer: + every department in between. No rigid process imposed.

comparison.heading: Full-featured. Without the lock-in.
comparison.subhead: Tûm gives you the capabilities of premium tools — with the freedom of open source.
comparison.footer: Data gathered from public feature listings as of June 2026. Check each product's website for the latest details.

ganttDemo.heading: See the Gantt chart
ganttDemo.subhead: Drag bars, explore dependencies, and see how smart scheduling works — right in your browser, no sign-up required.

hero.eyebrow: Open-source · For any team · Any background
hero.heading: Plan less. Ship more.
hero.subhead: Tûm brings tasks, timelines, and team visibility into one coherent workspace. No more scattered tools — just clear execution. For any team, any department, any project.
hero.microFooter: Free to use · No credit card required · Community & cloud plans

capabilities.label: Key Capabilities
capabilities.footer: Drag-and-drop scheduling, dependency arrows, milestone markers, and real-time progress tracking — all in one workspace.

timeline.title: Visual Timeline
timeline.description: Drag-and-drop scheduling with dependency arrows, milestone markers, and per-task progress bars. See your whole project at a glance — no spreadsheet required.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Dependency-aware auto-scheduling with critical path highlighting, SS/FF/SF semantics, and lag/lead offsets. Move one task and dependents shift automatically — no manual rework.

visibility.title: Dashboards & Analytics
visibility.description: Real-time dashboards with completion trends, status breakdowns, overdue counters, and burndown. Know what's on track and what needs attention — without a status meeting.

workload.title: Workload View
workload.description: Per-assignee task distribution across weeks with capacity tracking and overallocation alerts. See who has bandwidth before assigning the next task.

dependencies.title: Task Dependencies
dependencies.description: Link tasks so nothing starts before it should. Model sequential steps, parallel tracks, and milestones — Tûm keeps your plan coherent as things shift.

checklists.title: Checklists & Subtasks
checklists.description: Ordered checkable sub-items per task with progress rollups, plus nested subtask trees. Break down complex work without losing the big picture.

mentions.title: @Mention & Watchers
mentions.description: @mention teammates or use group mentions like @team and @assignees. Watch tasks to get notified on every change — nothing falls through the cracks.

team.title: Built for Every Team
team.description: Operations, marketing, events, personal projects, community initiatives — if you have a project and a team, Tûm fits. No technical background required.

selfHost.title: Self-host or Cloud
selfHost.description: Run Tûm on your own server for free, or use Tûm Cloud for zero-ops convenience. Fair-code license — free for internal use, no vendor lock-in.

signup.title: Sign up and create a workspace
signup.description: Get started in two minutes on Tûm Cloud — no setup required. Or self-host on your own server if you prefer to own your infrastructure.

organise.title: Organise your work
organise.description: Create projects and tasks. Assign owners, set priorities, add due dates and labels. Tûm adapts to how your team already works — no rigid process imposed.

timeline.title: See everything on the timeline
timeline.description: Drag tasks onto the Gantt chart, link dependencies, and mark key milestones. The full picture of your project, always up to date.

track.title: Track progress and adapt
track.description: Live dashboards show completion trends, overdue alerts, and status breakdowns as they happen. Adjust the plan as reality evolves — in seconds, not meetings.

pricing.heading: Free to run yourself.
pricing.intro: Tûm is open-source under a fair-code license. Self-host for free forever. Choose cloud hosting only when you want zero-ops convenience.
pricing.fairCodeNote: Fair-code license — free for internal use, cannot be resold as a competing service.

cta.heading: Your projects.
cta.subhead: Tûm brings tasks, timelines, and team visibility into one coherent workspace. Pick it up today — personally, with your team, or across your whole community.

footer.tagline: Project execution & workflow visibility. Built for teams that care about shipping.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: People in your organization and their roles.

settings.title: Organization settings
settings.subtitle: Name, slug, and preferences for your workspace.
